name: Scandinavian Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Core, peel, and slice apples.
2. Season the apple slices to taste with sugar and lemon juice.
3. Cook the apple slices in a small amount of water until they are tender.
4. Drain the cooked apples using a large strainer.
5. Pour melted butter into a 10-inch layer cake pan, spreading it evenly.
6. Sprinkle half of the toasted cake crumbs over the bottom of the pan.
7. Spread half of the cooked apple slices over the crumbs.
8. Top with currant jelly, then sprinkle nuts and add another cup of crumbs.
9. Place macaroons in a layer on top of the crumbs.
10. Add the remaining apple slices and cover with the remaining cake crumbs.
11. Bake at 450°F for 30 minutes.
12. Cool the cake in the refrigerator.
13. In a separate pan, sprinkle sliced almonds lightly with water, then sprinkle with sugar.
14. Toast the almonds at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden.
15. Whip the cream and frost the cooled cake.
16. Sprinkle the toasted almonds on top of the frosting.
